重大頭條（股市相關） ·

野村示警AI將拉長記憶體超級週期，雙上修韓廠目標並提估值可望貼近龍頭代工Nomura flags a drawn-out AI memory supercycle and lifts Korean targets toward leader-like valuations

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6461125

  • 野村將三星、SK海力士目標價大幅上調，隱含漲幅逾118％並維持買進評等。
  • 野村認為AI重心移向推理與AI代理後，記憶體供需進入結構性吃緊，與過去景氣週期不同。
  • RAG等應用讓KV快取需求由多項變數連乘放大，推論token消耗可能急速攀升。
  • 其情境顯示五年內需求或呈巨幅擴張，行業供給受擴產時程限制，約僅數倍級成長。
  • 新世代長約納入預付款與資本支出承諾，且HBM等高端品項供不應求，可望支撐高獲利。

野村上調兩韓國記憶體龍頭目標價，指推理與AI代理將透過KV快取推高結構需求，供給難速成長；新長約與資料中心對記憶體配比上升，並點名HBM吃緊，投資評價或淡化典型循環色彩。

  • Nomura sharply raised Samsung and SK Hynix targets, implying upside above 118% while keeping Buys on both.
  • It argues AI’s shift toward inference and agents locks in structural scarcity that breaks old cyclical patterns.
  • RAG-heavy workflows multiply KV-cache needs; inferred token throughput per user can climb fast as use cases deepen.
  • In its scenario demand may multiply massively within five years as supply ramps only modestly on fab timelines.
  • Longer LTAs pair prepayments with capex pledges; scarce HBM and advanced DRAM can underpin outsized profitability.

Nomura raised Samsung/SK Hynix targets on AI inference, agents and RAG lifting KV-cache needs; sluggish supply ramps, revamped LTAs and HBM scarcity…
